VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real, published at NeurIPS 2018 (arXiv:1809.11165). The real author order is Gardner, Pleiss, Bindel, Weinberger, Wilson — the cited reference simply lists Weinberger before Bindel, which is a minor ordering difference; all five authors are present and correct.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1809.11165
